examples: Even if the information is intercepted by a snooper, it is impossible for them to decipher it.
20% of couples had one text snooper.
The data looks like gibberish to a snooper as it travels from your computer to a secure server before it is blasted onto the Internet.
Anyone unwise enough to give their login and password would make their past and future e-mails, and contacts, available to the snooper.
The deputy prime minister told his weekly LBC radio phone-in that "what people have dubbed the snooper's charter" was "not going to happen".
